text.tspan: One-step publish to npm, jsr, crates.io,
Local-first bug reporting SDK for OSS CLIs
Cross-machine directory sync via Git with content-addressed dedup.
Open-source screen recording with auto-zoom and effects.
Animated ASCII-art SVGs from text, with eight effects.

g.text: I've contributed to open-source projects across the stack. It's the fastest way I've found to learn how an ecosystem actually works.
